description: Resolve repoId → localPath via the machine-local registry, then load aims from the linked .bowman (reuse listAims/getMany with that projectPath). Carry a visited-set to avoid cycles across repos. Return external aims tagged with their source repoId so the frontend can treat them as read-only and tint them. Endpoints for: list linked repos, resolve a {repoId,aimId}, and search within a linked repo (for cross-repo search fan-out).

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: repo-level-links-only pivot. The bulk here — load external AIMS from the linked .bowman, tag them read-only, search-within fan-out — is aim-level and dropped. The still-needed bit (resolve repoId→localPath + read the linked repo's meta name/color for the black-box node) is small and folded into the new repo-link data-model + rendering aims under e81b11c3.
